# Weekly Delivery Review Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Weekly Delivery Review — <Project or Workstream> — <Week>

## Health summary

Overall: Green / Amber / Red / Unknown

## What changed this week

## Progress against plan

| Milestone / deliverable | Planned | Current state | Evidence | Concern |
|---|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |  |

## Risks, blockers, and dependencies

## Decisions needed

## Stakeholder messages needed

## Next-week focus

1.
2.
3.

## Missing inputs / assumptions
```
